en: Ministry of Finance and Economy, Brunei Darussalam
Please indicate your company's business entity / form of business within Brunei:
Sole Proprietorship: A business owned and operated by a single individual
Partnership: A business owned by two or more individuals who share profits and losses
Private Limited Company (Sendirian Berhad - Sdn Bhd): A company with limited liability, owned by shareholders
Public Limited Company (Berhad - Bhd): A company with limited liability, whose shares are offered to the public
Limited Liability Partnership (LLP): A hybrid entity combining features of partnerships and corporations, providing limited liability to its partners
Cooperative: A business organization owned and operated by a group of individuals for their mutual benefit
Foreign entity with no local fiscal presence
